waypoints.note: 116th RCT (29th ID spearhead) embarked off Omaha; transit area V.
H-Hour 116th RCT first wave — Dog Green / Dog White sectors, west of 1st ID. Position approximates the Dog Green centerline (Vierville draw).

disputedBy.claim: Beevor and post-war US Army histories disagree on first-wave casualty figures at Dog Green; estimates range from ~50% to ~90% in the lead boat sections of A/116.

waypoints.note: Dog Green pinned at the seawall through the morning; A/116 Co takes catastrophic casualties.
Rangers take Pointe-du-Hoc (attached for assault); 116th RCT pushes off the beach via the Vierville draw (D-1).
End of MVP window: bluff line behind Dog sectors held; partial advance toward Vierville-sur-Mer. Position approximates division centroid.
